name: timer-calc
description: Generic timer period, frequency, initial-value, and error search tool. emb-agent core keeps only the abstract spec and does not include any vendor family/device adapters.
notes: The core defines only the input/output and result structure; concrete formulas should be handled by external adapters.
Do not generate final code directly; unify the tool protocol and extension points first.
Vendor/chip-specific implementations should live outside emb-agent core.
